results.hsDescription: Electrical machinery and equipment and parts thereof; sound recorders and reproducers, television image and sound recorders and reproducers, and parts and accessories of such articles

children.hsDescription: Microphones and stands therefor; loud-speakers, whether or not mounted in their enclosures; headphones and earphones, whether or not combined with a microphone, and sets consisting of a microphone and one or more loudspeakers; audio-frequency electric amplifiers; electric sound amplifier sets.
- Headphones and earphones, whether or not combined with a microphone, and sets consisting of a microphone and one or more loudspeakers.
